title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 11–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Emeth, Unknown person #11, Luffy, Bonney as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Boar's heading right for you! Look out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That thing is bad news!! It's gonna smash the ship!! We gotta run!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't hold it... being free is too tiring...
